name: Plasma Core
description: Warm FM synthesis bells with bright harmonic ring

prompts.SessionStart: bright ascending FM synthesis sweep rising two octaves with warm resonance, electronic bell tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SessionEnd: smooth descending FM synthesis tone with warm harmonic decay, resonant electronic bell, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.Stop: satisfying FM synthesis bell chime with bright harmonic ring and sustain, warm electronic tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PreToolUse: quick distinct FM synthesis tick with crisp electronic click, warm resonant tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PostToolUse: short confirming FM synthesis chirp with bright upward ping, warm electronic tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PermissionPrompt: two-tone FM synthesis alert with rising questioning inflection, warm resonant electronic tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.IdlePrompt: steady pulsing FM synthesis hum with warm rhythmic throb, resonant electronic tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStart: FM synthesis tone splitting into two diverging pitches, warm resonant electronic sound, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStop: clear returning FM synthesis ping with warm harmonic decay, resonant electronic tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: bright energetic FM synthesis burst with ascending harmonic sweep, warm resonant electronic tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
